member.name: T:Ubiquitus.App
member.summary: Interaction logic for App.xaml - Main application class
member.remarks: Handles the application startup sequence, including displaying the splash screen before showing the main window.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.App.Application_Startup(System.Object,System.Windows.StartupEventArgs)
member.remarks: This method is called when the application starts. It creates and displays the splash screen, then waits for it to close before showing the main window. The splash screen displays for 3 seconds (configured in SplashScreen.xaml.cs).

member.name: T:Ubiquitus.MainWindow
member.summary: Main window of the Ubiquitus application
member.remarks: This is the primary user interface window for the Ubiquitus text adventure game player. Currently displays a placeholder interface. Future versions will include: - Terminal-style text display for game output - Command input interface for player commands - Cartridge selection and management UI - Game state controls (save/load, restart, etc.)

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MainWindow class
member.remarks: Calls InitializeComponent() to load the XAML-defined user interface. The window is shown automatically after the splash screen closes.

member.name: T:Ubiquitus.SplashScreen
member.summary: Splash screen window displayed on application startup
member.remarks: Displays the Ubiquitus logo (ubiquitus-v1_1024x1024.png) for 3 seconds before automatically closing. The splash screen provides a professional startup experience and allows time for application initialization.

member.name: M:Ubiquitus.SplashScreen.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SplashScreen class
member.remarks: Sets up a DispatcherTimer that automatically closes the splash screen after 3 seconds. The timer is started immediately upon construction. The window is borderless, centered on screen, and displays the application logo.
